div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Winant)
div.p: 10759. For Bugbee from Haley. Following advisors to Haley selected for Rubber Study Group meeting: Viles,A. L. Viles, President, Rubber Manufacturers Association, Inc. Young,R. D. Young, President, Rubber Trade Association of New York, Inc. Collyer, Litchfield, Smith, Hotchkiss,H. Stuart Hotchkiss, Chairman, Cambridge Rubber Co. Firestone,Harvey S. Firestone, Jr., President, Firestone Tire and Rubber Co. Davis,F. B. Davis, Jr., Chairman, U.S. Rubber Co. TrimbleGilbert K. Trimble, Mid West Rubber Reclaiming Co. from industry; Batt,William L. Batt, Vice Chairman, War Production Board. Bicknell, KlossnerHoward J. Klossner, President, Rubber Reserve Corp. and ClarkJames Clark, Rubber Bureau, War Production Board. from government. Secretariat Phillips, DuBarryJoseph N. DuBarry, member of the Commodities Division of the Department. and Bugbee. Post conference trip to synthetic plants planned for January 29 to about February 2.
Department will attempt to dispatch three copies of revised report in time to reach London by January 8. Revised military tire ticket requires recomputation of consumption data. [Haley.]
